title: Iron Chest Unofficial
body:
A fork of Iron Chest for 1.7.10 with bug fixes, compatibility patches, and additional content.

Adds the following extra chests(Only available when some other mods add certain things, for example Et Futurum Requiem adding Netherite, or EnderIO adding Dark Steel):

- Steel
- Dark Steel
- Silver
- Netherite

Better support for NEI features such as pulling bookmarked items.

Other miscellaneous small bug fixes and performance improvements, and actively supported maintenance for Minecraft 1.7.10.
